Total USD split across all users each ho: Total USD split across all users each hour (B)

Applies amounts and enables Dynamic Quot: Applies amounts and enables Dynamic Quota — review then Save.
Preset applied — click Save to confirm: Preset applied — click Save to confirm
Small pool (~10 users). Tight budgets, q: Small pool (~10 users). Tight budgets, quota clearly scales with demand.
Balanced default (~30 users). Recommende: Balanced default (~30 users). Recommended for most shared gateways.
Large pool (~50 users). Loose limits, pr: Large pool (~50 users). Loose limits, prioritizes availability.
Minimal spend, everyone capped low. Good: Minimal spend, everyone capped low. Good for expensive models.
OAuth/quick-login users (GitHub, WeChat,: OAuth/quick-login users (GitHub, WeChat, Telegram, Passkey, etc.) must bind a verified email before they can log in. Password login is unaffected.
Dynamic quota is active — quota is reall: Dynamic quota is active — quota is reallocated hourly by demand.
Dynamic quota is disabled — users use a: Dynamic quota is disabled — users use a static balance.
Even-split baseline: pool ÷ active users: Even-split baseline: pool ÷ active users. Actual per-user quota varies by 24h demand (heavy users get more, capped at the per-user cap).
No tick has run yet. The first run happe: No tick has run yet. The first run happens at the next hour boundary.
Your quota is recomputed every hour base: Your quota is recomputed every hour based on your recent usage. Use more to get more (up to the cap); stay idle and it drops to the floor. No requests for {{n}} days removes your account.
Max spend per channel over the selected: Max spend per channel over the selected period (0 = no cap)
Window over which the channel cap is cou: Window over which the channel cap is counted
Maximum amount a user may recharge in a: Maximum amount a user may recharge in a single top-up (0 = unlimited)
Image shown on the left half of the logi: Image shown on the left half of the login/register page (optional). Leave empty for the default gradient.
Exceeds the single top-up maximum of {{n: Exceeds the single top-up maximum of {{n}}
Tiny pool for evaluation. Heavy throttle: Tiny pool for evaluation. Heavy throttle so a few users can try it.
Medium pool for a paying team (~20 users: Medium pool for a paying team (~20 users). Moderate limits, fair split.
Higher caps for intensive users (~10). L: Higher caps for intensive users (~10). Lets power users push the cap.
Export all configuration options as a JS: Export all configuration options as a JSON file for backup or migration.
